list.name: pair
list.label: Pair
list.definition: SELECT id as __value, canonical as __text FROM pairs WHERE is_enabled = true ORDER BY canonical

options.content:
**REALITY CHECK**: This dashboard shows ACTUAL execution outcomes compared to estimates.

- All metrics here are **execution-time actuals** (realized P&L, gas, slippage)
- For comparison with detection-time spread & execution-time estimates, see 'Prediction Accuracy' dashboard
- Key question: Are we making money after real costs?

targets.rawSql: SELECT created_at as time, SUM(realized_pnl_usd) OVER (ORDER BY created_at) as cumulative_pnl FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND realized_pnl_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'loss' AND realized_pnl_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND realized_pnl_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND realized_pnl_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND realized_pnl_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg1' AND realized_pnl_usd < -1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg5' AND realized_pnl_usd < -5)) ORDER BY time

SELECT created_at as time, realized_pnl_usd FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND realized_pnl_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'loss' AND realized_pnl_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND realized_pnl_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND realized_pnl_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND realized_pnl_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg1' AND realized_pnl_usd < -1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg5' AND realized_pnl_usd < -5)) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Win Rate
panels.description: Percentage of trades with positive realized P&L

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN realized_pnl_usd > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) ELSE 0 END as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND realized_pnl_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'loss' AND realized_pnl_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND realized_pnl_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND realized_pnl_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND realized_pnl_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg1' AND realized_pnl_usd < -1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg5' AND realized_pnl_usd < -5))

SELECT AVG(realized_pnl_usd) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_pnl_usd > 0 AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND realized_pnl_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'loss' AND realized_pnl_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND realized_pnl_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND realized_pnl_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND realized_pnl_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg1' AND realized_pnl_usd < -1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg5' AND realized_pnl_usd < -5))

SELECT AVG(realized_pnl_usd) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_pnl_usd < 0 AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND realized_pnl_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'loss' AND realized_pnl_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND realized_pnl_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND realized_pnl_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND realized_pnl_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg1' AND realized_pnl_usd < -1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg5' AND realized_pnl_usd < -5))
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(gas_cost_usd), 0) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}')

panels.title: Fill Rate
panels.description: Percentage of executions that were confirmed or filled

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('confirmed', 'filled') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) ELSE 0 END as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}')
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}')

panels.title: Avg Slippage (Realized)
panels.description: Average realized slippage in basis points

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(realized_slippage_bps) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_slippage_bps IS NOT NULL AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND realized_pnl_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'loss' AND realized_pnl_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND realized_pnl_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND realized_pnl_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND realized_pnl_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg1' AND realized_pnl_usd < -1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg5' AND realized_pnl_usd < -5))

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'reverted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) ELSE 0 END as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}')

SELECT realized_slippage_bps FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_slippage_bps IS NOT NULL AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND realized_pnl_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'loss' AND realized_pnl_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND realized_pnl_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND realized_pnl_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND realized_pnl_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg1' AND realized_pnl_usd < -1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg5' AND realized_pnl_usd < -5))

SELECT e.created_at as time, p.canonical as pair, e.expected_output_human as expected, e.actual_output_human as actual, ROUND((e.actual_output_human - e.expected_output_human) / NULLIF(e.expected_output_human, 0) * 100, 2) as diff_pct FROM executions e JOIN pairs p ON e.pair_id = p.id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND e.expected_output_human IS NOT NULL AND e.actual_output_human IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.created_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT COALESCE(status, 'unknown') as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND realized_pnl_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'loss' AND realized_pnl_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND realized_pnl_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND realized_pnl_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND realized_pnl_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg1' AND realized_pnl_usd < -1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg5' AND realized_pnl_usd < -5)) GROUP BY status ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT revert_reason, COUNT(*) as count FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND realized_pnl_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'loss' AND realized_pnl_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND realized_pnl_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND realized_pnl_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND realized_pnl_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg1' AND realized_pnl_usd < -1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg5' AND realized_pnl_usd < -5)) AND status = 'reverted' AND revert_reason IS NOT NULL GROUP BY revert_reason ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT e.created_at, p.canonical as pair, e.chain::text as chain, e.direction, e.status, e.is_paper_trade, e.input_amount_human, e.expected_output_human, e.actual_output_human, e.realized_slippage_bps, e.realized_pnl_usd, e.gas_cost_usd, e.tx_hash FROM executions e JOIN pairs p ON p.id = e.pair_id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR e.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND e.realized_pnl_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'loss' AND e.realized_pnl_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND e.realized_pnl_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND e.realized_pnl_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND e.realized_pnl_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg1' AND e.realized_pnl_usd < -1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg5' AND e.realized_pnl_usd < -5)) ORDER BY e.created_at DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT created_at as time, gas_cost_usd FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND gas_cost_usd IS NOT NULL AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND realized_pnl_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'loss' AND realized_pnl_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND realized_pnl_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND realized_pnl_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND realized_pnl_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg1' AND realized_pnl_usd < -1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg5' AND realized_pnl_usd < -5)) ORDER BY time

SELECT p.canonical as pair, COUNT(*) as count, COALESCE(SUM(e.realized_pnl_usd), 0) as total_pnl FROM executions e JOIN pairs p ON p.id = e.pair_id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR e.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND e.realized_pnl_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'loss' AND e.realized_pnl_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND e.realized_pnl_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND e.realized_pnl_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND e.realized_pnl_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg1' AND e.realized_pnl_usd < -1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'lt_neg5' AND e.realized_pnl_usd < -5)) GROUP BY p.canonical ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20
